headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on West Pharmaceutical Servs, Raises Price Target to $310
summary: Barclays  analyst Luke Sergott   maintains West Pharmaceutical Servs (NYSE:WST) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $275 to $310.
